description: Chrome login data parser reads Login Data SQLite and emits BrowserEvent per saved login — passwords NEVER exposed
steps: Query ONLY: SELECT origin_url, action_url, username_value, date_created, date_last_used FROM logins WHERE date_created > 0 ORDER BY date_created ASC
NEVER SELECT password_value — it must not appear anywhere in the query
Description: origin_url. Attrs: origin_url, action_url, username, date_last_used (i64)
Test: login_data_password_never_exposed — attrs['password'] == 'ENCRYPTED' for every row
Test: login_data_emits_url_and_username — attrs['origin_url'] and attrs['username'] correct
